name: @amafjarkasi/hd-eui-core
description: HD-EUI Core: A production-ready React UI library for hyper-dense enterprise applications. Built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, inspired by Zendesk's Compact Utilitarian design system. Features 33+ components with ultra-tight spacing (2-4px), micro-typography (8-11px), and a strict monochrome palette. Perfect for data-heavy dashboards, admin panels, and B2B tools where information density is critical. Includes Layout (Card, CardGrid, Modal, Sidebar), Form (Button, Input, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Slider), Feedback (Alert, Toast, Spinner, ProgressBar, Skeleton), Data Display (Table, Badge, Avatar, Tree, Accordion), and Navigation (Breadcrumb, Pagination, Stepper, Tabs, Dropdown) components. All components support TypeScript, theme customization, and accessibility out of the box. Live Storybook: https://hd-eui-storybook.netlify.app
author: Your Name
